debug_info.goal:
case pos
p : ℕ
inst✝¹ : Fact (Nat.Prime p)
inst✝ : Fact (p > 2)
n : ℕ
hn : 2 ^ (n + 1) < p
i : ℕ
env : Environment (F p)
input : Var fieldPair (F p)
x y : F p
h_input : Expression.eval env input.1 = x ∧ Expression.eval env input.2 = y
assumptions : ZMod.val x < 2 ^ n ∧ ZMod.val y < 2 ^ n
h_holds : ZMod.val y + 1 < 2 ^ n → env.get (i + n + 1) = if ZMod.val x < ZMod.val y + 1 then 1 else 0
this : 2 ^ n < 2 ^ (n + 1)
hy✝ : ZMod.val y + ZMod.val 1 < p
hy : ZMod.val y + 1 = 2 ^ n
⊢ env.get (i + n + 1) = if ZMod.val x ≤ ZMod.val y then 1 else 0

failed_attempts:
dsimp [LessThan.main] at h_holds
    rcases h_holds with ⟨bits, h_bits, h_out⟩
    rw [hy, add_sub_cancel_right] at h_bits
    have h_spec := Num2Bits.circuit (n+1) hn |>.soundness _ _ _ _ h_bits
    simp only [h_spec, assumptions.left, Nat.testBit_lt_two_pow, Bool.false_eq_true, ↓reduceIte,
      sub_zero] at h_out
    exact h_out

end LessEqThan
